ddls:
CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the political party of the candidate */,
  "current_position" TEXT /* Current position of the candidate (e.g., Senator, Governor) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biographical information about the candidate */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the candidate's photo */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Current status of the candidate's campaign (e.g., active, suspended, withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the political party */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the party's logo */,
  "party_leader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the leader of the party */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date the party was founded */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Description of the party's ideology */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the party's headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parties_party_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_leader_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statement */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate who made the statement */,
  "statement_date" TEXT /* Date the statement was made */,
  "latest_statement" TEXT /* Text of the latest statement */,
  "statement_score" INTEGER /* Sentiment score of the statement */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the source of the statement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statement was last updated */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the statement was made */,
  "event" TEXT /* Event where the statement was made */,
  "media_attachments" TEXT /* JSON array of media attachments (e.g., video links, images) */,
  "sentiment_category" TEXT /* Category of sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "impact_score" INTEGER /* Impact score of the statement (e.g., based on media coverage, public reaction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statements_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statement_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statement version */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the statement this version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_text" TEXT /* Text of the statement version */,
  "version_score" INTEGER /* Sentiment score of the statement version */,
  "version_source_url" TEXT /* URL to the source of the statement version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the statement version was made */,
  "event" TEXT /* Event where the statement version was made */,
  "media_attachments" TEXT /* JSON array of media attachments (e.g., video links, images) */,
  "sentiment_category" TEXT /* Category of sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "impact_score" INTEGER /* Impact score of the statement version (e.g., based on media coverage, public reaction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statement_versions_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statement_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "parent_topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent topic (for hierarchical topics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statement_topic_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the statement */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statement_topic_mapping_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES statement_topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statement_topic_mapping_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, campaign manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_campaigns" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign */,
  "role_in_campaign" TEXT /* Role of the user in the campaign (e.g., lead, assistant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_campaigns_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_campaigns_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, completed, pending) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was last updated */,
  "goals" TEXT /* JSON array of campaign goals */,
  "milestones" TEXT /* JSON array of campaign milestones */,
  "strategy_documents" TEXT /* JSON array of strategy documents (e.g., PDF links) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign the contribution is for */,
  "donor_name" TEXT /* Name of the donor */,
  "donor_email" TEXT /* Email address of the donor */,
  "donor_address" TEXT /* Address of the donor */,
  "contribution_amount" REAL /* Amount of the contribution */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contribution was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contribution was last updated */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the donor (if the donor is also a user) */,
  "donor_type" TEXT /* Type of the donor (e.g., individual, corporation, PAC) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_contributions_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_contributions_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., statement, campaign) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the resource */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
